title: nasturtium islandicum
intro: Nasturtium islandicum, also known as 'Peaches and Cream' or 'Alaska', is a perennial nasturtium variety that is native to the British Isles and has delicate white flowers with a peach-colored center. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Nasturtium islandicum include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
